svg.title: HA Platform Kubernetes Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing users connecting through a NodePort service to 3 web app pods, which connect to a PostgreSQL primary pod that replicates to 2 standby pods, with a CronJob for backups

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does external traffic reach the web app?')
sendPrompt('What is a NodePort service in Kubernetes?')
sendPrompt('What is pod anti-affinity in Kubernetes?')
sendPrompt('What is pod anti-affinity in Kubernetes?')
sendPrompt('What is pod anti-affinity in Kubernetes?')
sendPrompt('What is a headless service in Kubernetes?')
sendPrompt('How does PostgreSQL streaming replication work?')
sendPrompt('What is a PostgreSQL standby replica?')
sendPrompt('What is a PostgreSQL standby replica?')
sendPrompt('How does the backup CronJob work?')
